name: Auxiliary validation rule for Logging, Audit & Monitoring #11
description: Verify configuration matches parameters for UTSCF-LAM-11 in Logging, Audit & Monitoring category.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper auxiliary validation rule for logging, audit & monitoring #11 settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on Auxiliary validation rule for Logging, Audit & Monitoring #11.
